name: Phillips Curve
original_paper: Phillips AW (1958) Economica 25:283-299
data_source: World Bank WDI: SL.UEM.TOTL.ZS, FP.CPI.TOTL.ZG

name: Laffer Curve
original_paper: Laffer A (1974) unpublished (napkin sketch)
data_source: OECD Revenue Statistics 2022

name: Kuznets Curve
original_paper: Kuznets S (1955) Am Econ Rev 45:1-28
data_source: World Bank WDI: NY.GDP.PCAP.PP.KD, SI.POV.GINI

name: Environmental Kuznets Curve (CO2)
original_paper: Grossman GM, Krueger AB (1991) NBER WP 3914
data_source: World Bank WDI: NY.GDP.PCAP.PP.KD, EN.ATM.CO2E.PC

name: Beveridge Curve
original_paper: Beveridge W (1944) Full Employment in a Free Society
data_source: BLS JOLTS + Current Population Survey

name: Okun's Law
original_paper: Okun AM (1962) Proceedings of the Business and Economic Statistics Section, ASA
data_source: World Bank WDI: NY.GDP.MKTP.KD.ZG, SL.UEM.TOTL.ZS

name: Engel Curve
original_paper: Engel E (1857) Die Produktions- und Consumtionsverhältnisse des Königreichs Sachsen
data_source: World Bank WDI: NY.GDP.PCAP.PP.KD + USDA ERS food expenditure data

name: J-Curve (Trade)
original_paper: Magee SP (1973) The Balance of Payments. Brookings Papers
data_source: IMF International Financial Statistics; Bahmani-Oskooee & Ratha (2004) meta-analysis

name: Rahn Curve
original_paper: Rahn RW (1996) Institute for Policy Innovation
data_source: IMF World Economic Outlook: Government expenditure/GDP; WDI: GDP growth

name: Gravity Model of Trade
original_paper: Tinbergen J (1962) Shaping the World Economy
data_source: UN COMTRADE bilateral trade data; CEPII GeoDist database

name: Great Gatsby Curve
original_paper: Corak M (2013) J Econ Perspect 27(3):79-102
data_source: OECD Income Distribution Database; Corak (2013) replication data

name: Balassa-Samuelson Effect
original_paper: Balassa B (1964) J Political Economy 72:584-596
data_source: Penn World Table 10.01: productivity and price level data

name: Preston Curve
original_paper: Preston SH (1975) Popul Stud 29:231-248
data_source: World Bank WDI: NY.GDP.PCAP.PP.KD, SP.DYN.LE00.IN

name: Easterlin Paradox
original_paper: Easterlin RA (1974) in Nations and Households in Economic Growth
data_source: World Happiness Report 2023; World Bank WDI GDP per capita

name: McKeown Thesis (TB Mortality)
original_paper: McKeown T (1976) The Modern Rise of Population. Edward Arnold
data_source: McKeown (1976) Table 3.1; UK Office for National Statistics historical data

name: Linear No-Threshold (LNT)
original_paper: ICRP (1958) Publication 1; Ozasa et al. (2012) Radiat Res 177:229-243
data_source: RERF Life Span Study Report 14 (Ozasa et al. 2012)

name: Fries Compression of Morbidity
original_paper: Fries JF (1980) N Engl J Med 303:130-135
data_source: GBD 2019; Crimmins & Beltrán-Sánchez (2011) PNAS estimates

name: Barker Hypothesis (U-shape)
original_paper: Barker DJP (1990) BMJ 301:1111
data_source: Barker et al. (1993) BMJ; Leon et al. (1998) BMJ meta-analysis

name: Omran Epidemiological Transition
original_paper: Omran AR (1971) Milbank Mem Fund Q 49:509-538
data_source: WHO Global Health Estimates; UNDP HDI data

name: Wilkinson Curve
original_paper: Wilkinson RG (1996) Unhealthy Societies. Routledge
data_source: World Bank Gini; WHO life expectancy data

name: BMI-Mortality J-Curve
original_paper: Various; Global BMI Mortality Collaboration (2016) Lancet 388:776-786
data_source: Di Angelantonio et al. (2016) Lancet; Aune et al. (2016) BMJ meta-analysis

name: Alcohol-Mortality J-Curve
original_paper: Klatsky AL et al. (1981) Ann Intern Med 95:139-145
data_source: Zhao et al. (2017) J Stud Alcohol Drugs meta-analysis; Wood et al. (2018) Lancet

name: Demographic Transition Model
original_paper: Notestein FW (1945) in Population: The Long View
data_source: World Bank WDI: SP.DYN.TFRT.IN; UNDP HDI

name: Bongaarts-Feeney Tempo Adjustment
original_paper: Bongaarts J, Feeney G (1998) Popul Dev Rev 24:271-291
data_source: Human Fertility Database; Bongaarts & Sobotka (2012) Demography

name: Lee-Carter Mortality Model
original_paper: Lee RD, Carter LR (1992) J Am Stat Assoc 87:659-671
data_source: Human Mortality Database: USA period life tables

name: Coale-Trussell Fertility Schedule
original_paper: Coale AJ, Trussell TJ (1974) Popul Index 40:185-258
data_source: Coale & Trussell (1974); Human Fertility Database

name: Replacement Migration Curve
original_paper: UN Population Division (2000) Replacement Migration
data_source: UN WPP 2022; World Bank TFR data

name: Second Demographic Transition
original_paper: Van de Kaa DJ (1987) Popul Bull 42(1):1-57
data_source: World Bank WDI: SP.DYN.TFRT.IN; UNDP HDI

name: Species-Area Curve
original_paper: Arrhenius O (1921) J Ecol 9:95-99
data_source: Rosenzweig (1995) Species Diversity in Space and Time; BirdLife International

name: Hubbert Peak Oil
original_paper: Hubbert MK (1956) Nuclear Energy and the Fossil Fuels. API
data_source: US EIA Crude Oil Production data

name: Keeling Curve (CO2)
original_paper: Keeling CD (1960) Tellus 12:200-203
data_source: NOAA Global Monitoring Laboratory: Mauna Loa CO2 annual means

name: HANPP
original_paper: Vitousek PM et al. (1986) BioScience 36:368-373
data_source: Haberl et al. (2007) PNAS; World Bank GDP data

name: Jevons Paradox (Energy)
original_paper: Jevons WS (1865) The Coal Question. Macmillan
data_source: US EIA: Energy intensity and total consumption data

name: Forest Transition Curve
original_paper: Mather AS (1992) Area 24:367-379
data_source: World Bank WDI: NY.GDP.PCAP.PP.KD, AG.LND.FRST.ZS

name: Yerkes-Dodson Curve
original_paper: Yerkes RM, Dodson JD (1908) J Comp Neurol Psychol 18:459-482
data_source: Broadhurst (1957) replication; Diamond et al. (2007) Neural Plast review

name: Ebbinghaus Forgetting Curve
original_paper: Ebbinghaus H (1885) Über das Gedächtnis
data_source: Murre & Dros (2015) PLOS ONE replication; Rubin & Wenzel (1996) Psychon Bull Rev

name: Weber-Fechner Law
original_paper: Fechner GT (1860) Elemente der Psychophysik
data_source: Stevens (1961) Science; Kingdom & Prins (2016) Psychophysics textbook data

name: Dunning-Kruger Effect
original_paper: Kruger J, Dunning D (1999) J Pers Soc Psychol 77:1121-1134
data_source: Kruger & Dunning (1999) Studies 1-4; Gignac & Zajenkowski (2020) Intelligence replication

name: Happiness U-Curve (Age)
original_paper: Blanchflower DG, Oswald AJ (2008) Soc Sci Med 66:1733-1749
data_source: Blanchflower (2021) J Popul Econ updated estimates; Gallup World Poll

name: Hubble's Law
original_paper: Hubble E (1929) Proc Natl Acad Sci 15:168-173
data_source: NASA/IPAC Extragalactic Database (NED); Freedman et al. (2001) ApJ HST Key Project
claimed_form: Linear (v = H₀d); nonlinear acceleration at high z

name: Kleiber's Law
original_paper: Kleiber M (1932) Hilgardia 6:315-353
data_source: McNab (2008) Physiol Biochem Zool; White et al. (2007) PNAS compilation

name: Gutenberg-Richter Law
original_paper: Gutenberg B, Richter CF (1944) Bull Seismol Soc Am 34:185-188
data_source: USGS Earthquake Catalog (ComCat); ISC-GEM Global Instrumental Catalogue

name: Moore's Law
original_paper: Moore GE (1965) Electronics 38:114-117
data_source: Karl Rupp semiconductor database; Wikipedia transistor count list (verified against datasheets)

name: Lipset Hypothesis
original_paper: Lipset SM (1959) Am Polit Sci Rev 53:69-105
data_source: V-Dem Dataset v13; World Bank WDI GDP per capita

name: Duverger's Law
original_paper: Duverger M (1954) Political Parties. Wiley
data_source: Gallagher & Mitchell (2005) Politics of Electoral Systems; IDEA Electoral System Design

name: Zipf's Law (US Cities)
original_paper: Zipf GK (1949) Human Behavior and the Principle of Least Effort
data_source: US Census Bureau 2020 Census: Incorporated Places

name: Crime-Temperature Curve
original_paper: Anderson CA (1987) J Pers Soc Psychol 52:1161-1173
data_source: FBI UCR data; NOAA climate normals; Ranson (2014) J Environ Econ Manage

name: Putnam Social Capital
original_paper: Putnam RD (2000) Bowling Alone. Simon & Schuster
data_source: World Values Survey Wave 7; Eurobarometer trust data; OECD time use surveys

name: Mitscherlich Yield Curve
original_paper: Mitscherlich EA (1909) Landwirtschaftliche Jahrbücher 38:537-552
data_source: Cerrato & Blackmer (1990) Agron J; USDA NASS fertilizer response trials

name: Green Revolution Yield Curve
original_paper: Borlaug NE (1960s) various; Evenson & Gollin (2003) Science
data_source: World Bank WDI: AG.YLD.CREL.KG (Global cereal yield)

name: Micronutrient U-shape (Vitamin D)
original_paper: Durup et al. (2012) J Clin Endocrinol Metab 97:2644-2652
data_source: Durup et al. (2012); Garland et al. (2014) Anticancer Res meta-analysis

name: Body Weight Set-Point
original_paper: Keesey RE, Hirvonen MD (1997) Am J Clin Nutr 66:1026-1032
data_source: Hall et al. (2011) Lancet mathematical model; Leibel et al. (1995) NEJM
current_period: Caloric change bins from overfeeding/underfeeding studies
